title: midnight-craving ukrainian peel pancakes
description: a late-night treat featuring candied peel, crumbly texture, and a hint of eastern european flair
instructions: in a large bowl, whisk together almond flour, granulated sugar, and kosher salt.
in a separate bowl, whisk together eggs, melted butter, and vanilla extract.
add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until combined.
fold in the katsuramuki-cut candied orange peel.
using a small cookie scoop, portion out the batter onto a parchment-lined baking sheet.
bake for 15 minutes, or until the edges are lightly golden.
remove from the oven and let cool on the baking sheet for 5 minutes.
transfer the pancakes to a wire rack to cool completely.
serve warm, dust with powdered sugar if desired.
